name: LogoMarquee
description: Infinite scrolling logo/brand strip with CSS animation. Supports pause on hover and reduced motion.

children.description: Logo or brand elements to scroll

speed.description: Seconds for one complete scroll cycle. Lower = faster.

pauseOnHover.description: Pause scrolling when the user hovers

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes for the outer container

slots.name: children
slots.description: Logo or brand elements to scroll. Automatically duplicated for seamless loop.

layout.description: Full-width scrolling strip. Overflows hidden. Children duplicated for seamless loop.

aiPromptHint: Use LogoMarquee for scrolling partner logos, tech stack icons, or client brands. Pass logo elements as children. Adjust speed (seconds per cycle — lower = faster). Enable pauseOnHover for accessibility. Respects prefers-reduced-motion.

examples.title: Basic logo strip
Fast reverse scroll
examples.code: {techLogos.map((logo) => ( ))}

examples.title: No pause on hover
examples.code: Partner 1 Partner 2 Partner 3
